{{Quote|It's a civilized profession for an uncivilized galaxy.|Malis, on bounty hunting|<ref name="GG10">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''</ref>}}
'''Malis''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-licensed [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] with a twisted sense of justice.

==Biography==
In an interview with [[Rengor Vanth]] of [[Sektor 242 NewsLine]], Malis revealed that he hunted members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] because they were criminals, claiming that [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], in particular, was a vicious murderer for destroying the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] and everyone on it. Malis believed that [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] was justified, since it was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of rebellion against the order of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].<ref name="OSS" />

Malis also believed that he himself was simply a [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]], not a murderer, despite his record of bringing back [[Death/Legends|dead]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] more often than live captures.<ref name="OSS" /> Much of his ideas were believed to be stemmed from the fact that he was the only survivor of an Alliance [[Battle of Keskin|raid]] on [[Keskin]], which wiped out his entire platoon.<ref name="GG10" />

{{Char-stub}}
